info.name: Sukoon Dev API
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection for the Sukoon Dev housing and rental system containing all 39 endpoints organized by functional modules.

request.description: Register a new user account with phone/email, password, gender, and role (rental, owner, sponsor).
Login using email or phone with password.
Authenticate or register via Google or Facebook. New users must provide a role.
Verify account OTP sent to email or phone during registration/forgot-password.
Resend verification OTP code to email or phone.
Initiate forgot password flow to receive reset OTP code.
Reset password using the received OTP code.
Revoke the current active token session.
Revoke current active token and generate a new token.
Revoke the current active token session directly.
Change password for currently authenticated user.
Update the FCM notification registration token for the authenticated user.
Retrieve details and onboarding status of current authenticated user.
Complete rental type details (student or employee) as part of step 2 onboarding.

item.name: Save User Profile (Step 2 Owner/Sponsor, Step 3 Rental)

request.description: Complete user personal details (first_name, last_name, age, city, country, profile photo).
Complete company details for sponsor user onboarding step.
List apartments based on user role (Admin: all, Owner: their own, Tenant: open and approved matching their gender).
Create a new apartment draft with ownership document and optional photos (Owner only).
View detailed information for a specific apartment. Exact location is blurred for non-members.
Update details, upload/delete photos or change contract/documents of an existing apartment.
Permanently delete an apartment and all associated photos and files (Owner only).
Join an open apartment. Adds tenant to the apartment members as pending.
Leave an apartment. Cancels membership and triggers cancellation notification if payment phase was active.
Update owner payout account details.
Upload national ID or Passport document for identity verification.
Upload national ID or Passport document for identity verification.
Upload the signed lease contract file for the apartment.
Submit a refund request if a rent cycle was cancelled after payment was made.
Retrieve the status of the current/latest payment order.
Approve user identity document and mark user as verified (Admin only).
Reject user identity document with a specific reason (Admin only).
Verify ownership document. Automatically opens the apartment for leasing if verified (Admin only).
Reject apartment ownership document with a specific reason (Admin only).
Approve signed contract. Triggers Paymob split payment orders when all roommate contracts are accepted (Admin only).
Reject tenant signed contract with a specific reason (Admin only).
Retrieve comprehensive moderation information for an apartment including owner docs and all tenants (Admin only).
Approve a refund request and execute Paymob refund API (Admin only).
Reject a refund request and notify the tenant (Admin only).
Callback endpoint triggered by Paymob upon transaction completion (success or failure).
Retrieve a paginated list of notifications for the authenticated user.
Mark a specific notification as read by its UUID.
Mark all notifications for the authenticated user as read.
